title: Being Kind to AI... and to Yourself
description: Discover why being polite with AI matters — and why AI should always be honest with you.

steps.content: Mira asked her homework helper AI a question, but it gave a confusing answer. Mira's friend said: 'Just shout at it!' But Mira wasn't sure that was right.

steps.question: What should Mira do when the AI gives a confusing answer?
options: Ask the question in a different way

steps.content: Mira tried again with a clearer question. The AI understood her perfectly! Being clear is a kind of kindness — to yourself and to the tool.

steps.instruction: Which of these is the RIGHT way to use an AI helper?
options: Use it to copy your homework and say it's yours
Use it to understand a tricky idea and write it in your own words
Let the AI answer all your tests for you

steps.content: Mira finished her homework feeling proud. She used AI as a helper, not as a replacement. Great job, Mira! 🌸
